texto: There's this idea that to live out of conformity with how I feel is hypocrisy; but that's a wrong definition of hypocrisy. To live out of conformity to what I believe is hypocrisy. To live in conformity with what I believe, in spite of what I feel, isn't hypocrisy; it's integrity.
explicacao: Citação de Erik Thoennes sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There's this idea that to live out of conformity with how I feel is hypocrisy; but that's a wrong…” articula motivacao, inspirational-attitude, vida em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e vida.

frase_original: There's this idea that to live out of conformity with how I feel is hypocrisy; but that's a wrong definition of hypocrisy. To live out of conformity to what I believe is hypocrisy. To live in conformity with what I believe, in spite of what I feel, isn't hypocrisy; it's integrity.
